title: Undo Button for Emails Sent
excerpt: way to stop or cancel replies to specific emails? Similar to Gmail’s “undo send” feature that allows retrieval within 10 seconds?

posts.author: manderson (Meghan Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: way to stop or cancel replies to specific emails? Similar to Gmail’s “undo send” feature that allows retrieval within 10 seconds?

posts.author: KFMC (Lydia)
posts.cookedHtml: Seconding this! I would LOVE for this to be an available feature! I have too many instances where I send an email and forgot to add something, remove something, no longer need to send it, sent it too early, etc., but I also don’t want to work out of gmail since there is no native email tracking integration for it. So I suggest either making an undo feature, OR create a browser plugin that connects to email accounts (like gmail) so that we can have all of our native email’s features AND the monday.com tracking
